text:
Eternal Hammer (不死の大金槌, Fushi no Ookanazuchi) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

| colspan="3" align="center" |Anyone hit with this hammer will be afflicted with one random attack spell, and cannot defend him or herself with a defensive spell. However, it will not work on someone using "Fortress" or Paladin's Necklace.
|

Summary

This card allows the caster to summon forth an Eternal Hammer. When used to hit someone, they will be struck with a random attack spell that cannot be defended against. Anyone using "Fortress" or Paladin's Necklace will however counteract this card's effects.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.088 :: 不死の大金槌 
この金槌で殴られた者は、ランダムで攻撃呪文のいずれかの効果をうける。これを防御呪文で防ぐことはできない。ただし「堅牢」「聖騎士の首飾り」の使用者には無効。
|-
![Eng]
|No.088 :: Eternal Hammer 
Anyone beaten with this hammer, is hit with a random spell effect. It can not be defended against unless with Fortress" or Paladin's Necklace.
|}
